---
name: "TH1 E2 — Graph Persistence and Provenance"
about: "Implement TH1.E2 Graph Persistence and Provenance"
labels: [epic, TH1, E2]
assignees: [copilot]
---

- [ ] US1 — Persist entities and relationships from native writes: store entity-centric nodes and relationships in Kuzu from validated payloads.
- [ ] US2 — Store reasoning units and agent sessions with provenance: persist trust-critical reasoning and session records with required metadata.
- [ ] US3 — Support graph updates and revision anchors: enable cleanup-friendly updates while recording comparable revision anchors.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH1-cognitive-graph-engine-mvp/epics/E2-graph-persistence-provenance/stories/`
